title: New Monitoring Station Established at 5,200m on Langtang Ridge
description: Our team has successfully installed a year-round automated environmental monitoring station at 5,200 metres on Langtang Ridge — the highest in our network. The station records temperature, humidity, soil moisture, and captures hourly wildlife camera images processed by our AI detection pipeline.

title: Foundation Research Cited in Nepal National Climate Adaptation Plan
description: Glacial lake outburst flood risk models developed by our glaciology team have been incorporated into Nepal's 2026 National Climate Adaptation Plan. The models, covering 47 high-risk glacial lakes, will inform early warning system deployment across three river basins.

title: Partnership Announced with Global Mountain Research Consortium
description: The Foundation has formalised a five-year research partnership with the Global Mountain Research Consortium, enabling joint field expeditions, shared data infrastructure, and co-funded PhD positions focused on high-altitude ecosystem science.
